active_shortlist.title: Specialized Stumpjumper EVO Comp, Size - S3, Carbon All-Mountain Bike
active_shortlist.description:
• Brand – Specialized
• Model – Stumpjumper EVO Comp
• Year – 2021
• MSRP – $4,999
• Size – S3 
• Recommended for height - 5'5" – 5'11"
• Material – FACT 11m Carbon Fiber (Sidearm Chassis)
• Color – Satin Black
• Brakes – Shimano SLX M7120, 4-piston Hydraulic Disc
• Weight – ~31lbs 
• Cassette – Shimano SLX, 12-speed, 10-51t
• Chainrings – 30T Shimano
• Components Group – Shimano SLX M7100
• Crank – Shimano SLX FC-M7100, 170 mm
• Drivetrain – 1x12 Mechanical
• Fork – Fox Float 36 Rhythm, GRIP damper, 160 mm travel
• Rear Shock – Fox Float DPX2 Performance, 150 mm travel
• Seatpost – X-Fusion Manic Dropper, 150 mm travel
• Stem – Specialized Trail, alloy
• Tires – Front/Rear: Maxxis Ardent 29x2.40" (Tubeless Ready)
• Wheels – Roval Traverse 29 Alloy, 30mm internal width
• Wheel Material – Aluminum
• Tubeless Compatibility – Yes
• Handlebars – Specialized 6061 alloy, 780 mm
• Saddle – Specialized Power

Mechanic Notes:

This 2021 EVO model features the highly adjustable S-Sizing geometry, allowing for three headset positions and a flip-chip at the chainstay to tune the BB height. The FACT 11m carbon frame includes the integrated SWAT Door for internal down tube storage. The drivetrain and braking are handled by the bulletproof Shimano SLX 4-piston system, known for its consistent performance. Fully inspected; the DPX2 shock is plush, and the frame pivot bearings are smooth.

We are Lebel Bicycles, an online and offline retailer specializing in pre-owned bikes, based in San Juan Capistrano, CA. Our current inventory includes 200 + bicycles. Please feel free to check out our profile or visit our website at LebelBicycles

Please feel free to check profile for additional listings, along with 100% positive feedback from over 1,000 successful sales. Buy with confidence from an established and trusted Marketplace seller. Don’t hesitate to message me with any questions!

Shipping: lower 48 United States price is flat 99$, Alaska Hawaii or Canada 550$. Bike will be professionally boxed up, and shipped with insurance through a well known shipper FedEx. less

active_shortlist.title: Yeti SB 5.5 Turq large carbon frame & wheels immaculate
active_shortlist.description:
2018 Yeti SB 5.5 Turq size large, carbon wheels, Kashima fork and shock. 
Immaculate mountain bike, no damage, well cared for.
Nothing wrong, I just don’t ride the types of trails this bike is built to handle anymore. I ride my SB 4.5 long distance, and this beautiful bike is not getting ridden. I covered all of the contact points with helicopter tape, so the frame and fork legs are in perfect condition. No scratches on the fork stanchions. I live at the trailhead, so I never had to transport this bike. No damage from bike racks or piling it in a truck with other bikes. You will not find an SB 5.5 Turq in this condition anywhere. I greased the switch infinity every 40 hours of riding.  Come check it out. 


Turq frame! Lighter and stronger 
Reynolds TR 309 29” carbon wheels 
Size large Turq frame, no chips or scratches 
Fox Factory 36 Grip2 fork Kashima no scratches! 
Fox Float DPX2 Kashima no scratches! 
SRAM XO derailleur 
SRAM Code RSC brakes
Crank brothers dropper post
Truvativ Descendent carbon bars 
Truvativ stem
Cane Creek headset 
WTB saddle 
Maxxis Minion DHF / Aggressor tires still in good condition  
Shimano XT M8020 Pedals included for an additional $80

active_shortlist.title: Santa Cruz Hightower Carbon - S Kit - 2019
active_shortlist.description:
Santa Cruz Hightower Carbon - S Kit - 2019 with Reserve Carbon Wheels


Built for big days in big terrain.

The Hightower brings versatility and brawn to the game while hitting a sweet spot for aggressive trail riding. It sports 135mm of rear travel, fast-rolling 29er wheels, and a 67-degree head angle. 

The Hightower gives you the extra bit of confidence to let off the brakes and let 'er rip through the rough stuff. It feels well-balanced in the air and corners like a champ. At the same time, it is has impeccable trail manners and pedals efficiently, so you won’t get that ‘too much bike’ feeling if you end up doing an extra lap or pushing your ride further into the hills.

Santa Cruz Hightower

* 		135mm (5.3") VPP™ suspension
* 		148mm Rear Axle Spacing
* 		15mm thru-axle fork
* 		27.5+ or 29" wheels
* 		Bottle cage mount within front triangle fits piggyback shocks
* 		Carbon C and Carbon CC frame options
* 		Double sealed pivots for long bearing life
* 		Integrated Headset (IS41; IS52)
* 		Internal carbon tubes ensure precise and hassle-free routing of derailleur and seat post cables
* 		ISCG-05 tabs for chainguide compatibility
* 		Threaded Bottom Bracket


Specifications
Weight: 12.88kg / 28.4lbs
Material: Carbon C
Wheel Size: 29"
Fork: FOX 36 Float Performance, 140mm, 29"
Shock: FOX Float Performance DPS
Rear Deraileur: SRAM GX Eagle
Shifters: SRAM AXS
Crankset: SRAM Stylo 7k 148 DUB, 32t - 170mm (XS-S), 175mm (M-XL)
Cassete: SRAM XG1275 Eagle 10-50T
Chain: SRAM NX Eagle
Brakes: SRAM Guide R
Brake Rotors: Avid Centerline 180mm 
Headset: Cane Creek 40 IS Integrated Headset
Bars: One Up Carbon riser bar 35mm
Stem: Race Face Aeffect R 50mm
Grips: Santa Cruz Palmdale Grips
Wheels: RESERVE CARBON WHEELS
Front Tire: Maxxis Minion 29x2.3 DHF 3c EXO TR
Rear Tire: Maxxis Minion DHR2 29x2.3 EXO TR
Tubes: Stans Sealant 2oz

active_shortlist.title: Devinci Spartan Mountain Bike

summary.logic: This is a real all-premium 2020 Race X01 build (MSRP ~$5,999 per Mountain Bike Picker's 2020 spec table) at $2,900 asking — 48% of MSRP on a 6-year-old enduro, dropping to ~42% effective after the user's typical $375 lowball. Owner-disclosed flaws (rear shock due for routine rebuild, carbon crank cosmetic chip, BB-area frame wear) are honest and consistent with the X2 squelch issue widely reported in forums (singletrackworld, MBR), so the disclosure is cr...
summary.watch_trigger: drive over to inspect within the next week. If
summary.buyer_ceiling: $1,800 — won't pay above
summary.flip_verdict: thin. Best case is ~$195 over 3–8 weeks of carry.

summary.logic: The bike is genuinely well-spec'd and well-maintained — GX AXS wireless, Fox Factory 36 (converted to 170mm) and Float X2 Factory both Kashima, Industry Nine stem, BikeYoke Revive Max dropper, and fresh brakes on a ridewrapped carbon Ripmo V2 frame. But two structural problems: (1) the frame is XL, which is a dealbreaker per the user's size preference — the L/M resale pool in SoCal is several times deeper than XL, and (2) even at the right size, $2,650 as...
summary.buyer_ceiling: $1,800 — 68% of ask. The seller is
summary.probable_clear: $2,250 — XL clears 10–15% below L/M of the
summary.flip_verdict: thin and slow. Expected $200 over 6–10 weeks is

summary.logic: The bike checks the right boxes — 2024 carbon enduro, Large frame (matches size preference), 17 photos, 1156-char description, near-zero miles on the wheels/cassette/tires (genuine demo-bike pattern). Asking $2,000 is roughly 31% of the 2024 €5,999 MSRP — a steeper discount than a 2-year-old carbon enduro should clear at, which is the "investigate hard" tier from msrp-discount-math. Two reasons not to BUY at ask: (1) the user explicitly named $1,800 as th...
summary.watch_trigger: **BUY at $1,800 cash, immediate pickup. PASS if
summary.buyer_ceiling: $1,800 — the user's stated target, ratified
summary.probable_clear: $2,100 — NX/GX/G2R spec caps the ceiling;
summary.flip_verdict: thin-to-acceptable. Expected $110 profit over 4–6

summary.logic: The bike itself is excellent — BikeRadar's 2024 Enduro Bike of the Year, mechanic-owned with monthly service, and built well beyond stock spec with a coil Fox DHX2, Grip X2 fork internals, XX1 AXS, and TRP Evo Pro Gold brakes. The problem is purely pricing: $3,000 is the highest comp in the entire corpus for this model, and the market has already voted by leaving it unsold for 7+ months.
